name: Superb Cash Advance
description_short: Superb Cash Advance at 403 E Tryon Rd a, Raleigh, NC 27610 in the Southwest Raleigh neighborhood is Mon-Fri 8:30 AM – 8:30 PM. Google reviewers rate the branch 4.1 stars across 10 reviews. Call +1 919-877-6372.
description_long:
Superb Cash Advance operates a physical storefront at 1919 Metropolitan Pkwy SW in Atlanta, Georgia (zip 30315). The location offers walk-in service six days a week with extended hours—Monday through Friday 8:30 a.m. to 8:30 p.m. and weekends 9:30 a.m. to 6:30 p.m.—making it accessible to borrowers who cannot visit during standard business hours. The phone number listed is (404) 994-3414.

The company offers four core loan products: payday loans (up to $1,000), cash advance loans (up to $1,000), same-day loans with minimal documentation, and bad credit loans ranging from $250 to $50,000. All products are marketed as unsecured, meaning no collateral is required, and all credit types are stated as welcome. The broader bad-credit loan range ($250–$50,000) suggests the company acts as a broker or referral partner for larger loan amounts rather than a direct originator of all products advertised.

The primary differentiator is accessibility: no credit check is emphasized in customer reviews, approval is described as fast, and funds are reportedly disbursed the same day. The physical location provides a face-to-face option for borrowers who prefer in-person service or need to resolve issues directly. Extended weekend hours add meaningful convenience for hourly workers. Customer reviews on the page rate the location 4.0 out of 5 ("Great").

Borrowers should exercise caution. The website discloses no APR figures, fee schedules, or repayment terms for any product—a significant transparency gap for products that frequently carry triple-digit effective APRs. Notably, several reviews prominently mention a location in Arvada, Colorado and a staff member named Helen, despite this page being for an Atlanta, Georgia address; this inconsistency raises questions about the authenticity of the displayed reviews. No state licensing information is visible on the page. This lender is best suited to borrowers who have exhausted lower-cost alternatives and need a small amount of cash immediately.
address: 403 E Tryon Rd a, Raleigh, NC 27610

company_info.headquarters: 403 E Tryon Rd a, Raleigh, NC 27610

pros: All credit types accepted — explicitly states no credit check required
Same-day approval and same-day cash disbursement available
Physical storefront with in-person service (no online-only friction)
Extended weekday hours (8:30 a.m.–8:30 p.m.) and weekend availability
Unsecured loans — no collateral required for any advertised product
Wide loan range advertised: $250 up to $50,000 for bad-credit product
Minimal documentation required for same-day loan product
cons: No APR, fee schedule, or repayment term disclosures anywhere on the page
Multiple customer reviews reference an Arvada, Colorado location and a specific employee (Helen) — inconsistent with this Atlanta address, casting doubt on review authenticity
Payday and cash advance products capped at $1,000 — limited for larger emergency needs
No state licensing or regulatory affiliation information displayed
Large loan amounts ($50K) likely involve third-party lenders not disclosed on site
best_for: Atlanta residents with bad or no credit who need up to $1,000 same day
Borrowers who prefer in-person service over an online application
People who have been declined by traditional banks or credit unions
Hourly workers who need access outside standard 9–5 banking hours
diagnosis: Superb Cash Advance is best for Atlanta-area borrowers with damaged credit who need a small amount of cash (under $1,000) quickly and prefer a physical, in-person lender. The main caveat is a complete absence of rate and fee transparency on the website, which is a strong signal that costs are high — borrowers should ask explicitly for the APR before signing anything.
services: Second lien title loans (referenced in customer reviews)
Unsecured personal loans for bad credit
Walk-in service with extended hours including weekends
